blocks.text: kept watching. He had already identified who in this group watched without being watched back.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Okay. Story time. Since we have guests.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: No.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: The Appalachian Trail story.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: We are not telling that story.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: We are absolutely telling that story.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: There are new people here.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: That's why we're telling it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Now I need to hear this.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: It was one bad decision. One.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: It was seventeen sequential bad decisions that he made sound like a plan.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: There was a map involved. He had a map.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: I had a map.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: He had a map of the wrong trail.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: They look the same.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: They really don't.

blocks.speaker: Wren Cole
blocks.content: You were gone for eleven hours.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: It was a long trail.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: It was a parking lot loop. He was in a parking lot loop for eleven hours.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: I'm sorry — how?

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: The lot was very large.

blocks.prompt: The whole group is laughing. What does Julian do?

options.label: He smiles. It almost reaches his eyes.
